name: Showrunner Exporter (WASM)
description: Export entities and narratives to Showrunner.xyz for AI-powered show production. Push character bibles, episode outlines, dialogue scripts, and world data to Showrunner projects.
author: BiloxiStudios

showrunner_api_key.label: Showrunner API Key
showrunner_api_key.description: API key for your Showrunner.xyz account

auto_sync.label: Auto-sync on Entity Update
auto_sync.description: Automatically push entity changes to Showrunner when they are updated

include_voice_data.label: Include Voice Data
include_voice_data.description: Include voice style and voice reference data in character exports

showrunner_api_url.label: Showrunner API URL
showrunner_api_url.description: Base URL for the Showrunner.xyz API

export_mode.label: Export Mode
export_mode.description: What to export: characters-only, full-bible (characters + locations + factions), episode-pack (includes quests as episodes)

dialogue_format.label: Dialogue Format
dialogue_format.description: Script format for dialogue exports: screenplay, fountain, showrunner-native

include_portraits.label: Include Character Portraits
include_portraits.description: Upload entity portraits as character reference images
